series_metadata.series_title: BSI-SB Corporate Applications; Orders and Requests for Regulatory Approval
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information related to corporate applications, orders and requests for regulatory approval with the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and related agreements, exhibits and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years dissolution of institution or trust company
